message: 🌱 Add flux: Cannot seem to get the completions working in zsh mission (#582)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-971-cannot-seem-to-get-the-completions-working-in-zsh",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: Cannot seem to get the completions working in zsh",
+    "description": "Cannot seem to get the completions working in zsh. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flux troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flux deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\nRunning the `. <(flux completion zsh)` command in the terminal or adding it to the ~/.zshrc file produce no completion results. changing the `.` to `source` also produce no results."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Cannot seem to get the completions working in zsh",
+        "description": "This PR fixes `flux completion zsh` to work with `source` only.\n\n`flux completion zsh` does not work with `source <(flux completion zsh)`, and needs to be executed as follows:\n\n```\nsource <(flux completion zsh) && compdef _flux flux\n```\n\nThis is confusing to Kubernetes users because `kubectl\n```yaml\nThis is confusing to Kubernetes users because `kubectl completion zsh` works well with `source <(kubectl completion zsh)`.\n\nFixes https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/971\nSame here :-(\nTry this\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Cannot seem to get the completions working in zsh is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR fixes `flux completion zsh` to work with `source` only.\n\n`flux completion zsh` does not work with `source <(flux completion zsh)`, and needs to be executed as follows:\n\n```\nsource <(flux completion zsh) && compdef _flux flux\n```\n\nThis is confusing to Kubernetes users because `kubectl completion zsh` works well with `source <(kubectl completion zsh)`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "This is confusing to Kubernetes users because `kubectl completion zsh` works well with `source <(kubectl completion zsh)`.\n\nFixes https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/971\nSame here :-(\nTry this"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Replicaset"
+    ],

+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/pull/1833"
+    },

+  },

+  },
